candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Although operating and D&A-related, it is explicitly a subcomponent of the separately disclosed R&D expense row already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Per the R&D interaction rule, it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This appears to be a subcomponent within the selected parent SG&A bucket 'General and administrative expenses', not a separate same-level operating line to add later.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are 'General and administrative expenses' and 'Research and development expenses'. Both visible D&A rows are labelled as being inside those parent expense buckets, so adding them separately would double count. The R&D D&A row is especially excluded because R&D is already selected separately in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
